title: Smoky American Corn Skillet
description: A delicious twist on a classic skillet dish, featuring smoky flavors and sweet corn.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add corn kernels and stir to combine.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until corn is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
If using cheese, sprinkle on top and cook until melted.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
